title: Spawn Egg Models
description: Replaces vanilla spawn egg models to 3D mob model
body:
Replaces vanilla spawn egg models with mob 3D model. Supports other mods and custom spawn eggs with entity_data component.

![Part of "Spawn Eggs" creative tab](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/dPvsBe7s/images/903fa701ae8c37d9917edd4936d8269aded5e83d.png)
